notes: v0.20.6 — SETTINGS overhaul. BEAT OFFSET slider removed (per-client offsets would desync hits in PvP and split Boss Rush leaderboards). New 5-tab structure: AUDIO / VIDEO / GAMEPLAY / CONTROLS / ACCOUNT. AUDIO adds Music Volume + Mute When Window Loses Focus. VIDEO replaces the FULLSCREEN toggle with a Display Mode dropdown (Fullscreen / Borderless / Windowed) and adds VSync, FPS Limit (60/120/144/240/Unlimited), Show FPS Counter overlay, Screen Shake intensity. GAMEPLAY (new) holds Mouse Sensitivity (reserved for controller post-Steam), Crosshair Size + preview (moved from VIDEO), HUD Opacity / Scale, Damage Numbers / Kill Feed / Show Ping toggles. ACCOUNT gains a read-only Account ID display. Particle Density was on the plan but cut — too much of what looks like 'particles' in Pulsewave (boss telegraphs, bullet trails, AOE warnings) is gameplay-critical.
